title: Missing coverage for BaseException re-raise path in TUI loops
description: The updated handlers in _raw_rx_loop, _logs_loop, _observe_messages_loop now re-raise SystemExit/KeyboardInterrupt/GeneratorExit but no test exercises this path with independent oracle (e.g. sending KeyboardInterrupt signal to test process and verifying propagation). Current tests/tui/test_native.py only covers normal paths. P2 as test gap.
